subcodes.first_line: A question was asked concerning Ghadir Khumm. The account of Ghadir Khumm is that during the Farewell Pilgrimage, His Holiness the Messenger [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: از غدیر خم سئوال شده بود حکایت غدیر خم این است که در حجة الوداع حضرت رسول
subcodes.subjects: @family of Muhammad; early figures in Islam, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @the Imamate; the Caliphate, @episodes from the early history of Islam, @rejection, opposition and persecution
